hero.title: Stop relying on Facebook to sell.
hero.subtitle: Take back control of your business with a website, e-commerce store and acquisition strategy that truly belong to you.

problem.title: Facebook is not a business
problem.subtitle: Most Algerian entrepreneurs sell only on Facebook. One algorithm change, block or suspension can wipe out your overnight.

items.title: You do not own your audience
items.description: Your customers stay on a platform you do not control. Account closure means total loss.

items.title: Your margins are melting
items.description: Competition and ad costs are rising. You rely on a capricious algorithm to reach your own followers.

items.title: You lack credibility
items.description: A professional website reassures, converts better and positions you as a real brand.

solution.title: Build durable digital assets
solution.subtitle: We support you with practical training and agency services to sell online without depending on a single platform.

items.title: A website that converts
items.description: Learn to create a showcase or e-commerce site that captures leads and sells 24/7.

items.title: Controlled acquisition
items.description: Master SEO, ads and copywriting to attract your ideal customers.

items.title: A brand that lasts
items.description: Turn your Facebook audience into traffic, emails and recurring revenue.

testimonials.title: They took back control of their business

items.quote: I stopped stressing over every algorithm change. My website generates sales every day.
items.author: Sofiane B.

items.quote: The WooCommerce course helped me launch my store in 3 weeks, without coding.
items.author: Karima T.

items.quote: I finally understood why my ads were not converting. A real turning point.

items.question: Who can follow these courses?
items.answer: Any entrepreneur, freelancer or merchant in Algeria who wants to sell online. No technical skills are required to start.

items.question: Can I pay online from Algeria?
items.answer: Yes. We offer payment methods available in Algerian dinars (CCP, Baridimob, bank transfer or card depending on the offer).

items.question: Can I work directly with the agency?
items.answer: Absolutely. Business Algerie also offers turnkey support: website creation, ads, copywriting and strategy.

items.question: Are the courses kept up to date?
items.answer: Yes, our courses evolve with the tools, algorithms and best practices of the Algerian market.

items.question: What if I do not have a website?
items.answer: That is exactly the starting point. Our flagship course guides you step by step, from Facebook to your own site.
